The paper presents a representation theorem based on Granger (1983), which connects the moving average, autoregressive, and error correction representations ...
The relationship between co-integration and error correction models, first suggested in Granger (1981), is here extended and used to develop estimation procedures, tests, and empirical examples.

name: Engle, R. and Granger, C. (1987) Cointegration and Error Correction
snippet: In this study we investigate whether stock prices and economic activity in India are co-integrated by using monthly data from 1960 to 2013.
